inline_comments.message:
This is super-interesting in case of gating...
Due to the reason, that resource models used in pnfRegistration do not really use CDS packages.
skip_post_instantiation_configuration flag is set to its default value -- true.

This has been fixed for PNFs in this MR: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/so/+/113839
Is there a chance, that this code has been overwritten by other commits merged recently?
